description: You are a forensic traffic accident investigator validating a driver's claim of being blinded by sun glare during a collision in Manhattan (40.750° N, -73.996° W) on July 13, 2023, at 00:20:00 UTC, as detailed in /home/ga/data/crash_report_ny.json. The driver was heading westbound at a compass bearing of 299°. Reconstruct the sky conditions at this time and location, ensuring the atmosphere, ground, azimuthal grid, and cardinal directions are visible. Capture a screenshot of the sun's position relative to the azimuthal grid to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. Write a forensic report to /home/ga/Desktop/glare_investigation_report.txt including the city, the observed azimuth of the sun, and a conclusion on whether the sun glare claim is plausible.
